tier_remaining_note: Tier A fully cleared in chunk 88 (all 12 Iceland/Macau-UAE pairs built). Tier B recomputed from a disk-reconciled rerun of generate_build_plan_v2.py's scoring model on 2026-07-17 (ROUTES_DIR fixed locally to the non-Windows path for this run only, the script file on disk still has the Windows-style path and needs a permanent fix): 521 remaining before chunk 88, minus the 38 Tier B pairs chunk 88 built, leaves 483. Not yet covered by verify_build_state.py's automatic disk reconciliation (only route_pairs/blog/total_markdown_files are); re-run the generator manually each chunk until that gap is closed.
notes: Chunk 88 DONE (Template C, Tier A + Tier B, 50 new routes, 2 blocks, one batch). Built via 14 parallel research agents. Closed out ALL 12 remaining Tier A pairs (Iceland x UK/US/Australia/UAE/Canada both directions, 10 routes; Macau x UAE both directions, 2 routes), deliberately prioritised this run per the chunk 87 note that they outscore every Tier B pair. Filled the remaining 38 routes with the highest-scored unbuilt Tier B pairs: UK and US reverse legs (the destination-country IMPORT side, a genuinely new research angle versus chunk 87's export-side pages for the same 16 countries) for Bosnia and Herzegovina, Cameroon, Eswatini, Ivory Coast, Kosovo, Kyrgyzstan, Lesotho, Madagascar, Malawi, Moldova, Mongolia, Montenegro, Mozambique, North Macedonia, Senegal and Tajikistan (both directions, 32 routes); Turkmenistan's UK leg only (1 route, US leg deliberately deferred to hold the batch at 50); and the missing US legs for Albania, Algeria, Angola, Bahamas and Belarus (5 routes) to complete their existing UK-only coverage. Genuine differentiators found: the UK and Iceland both sit on MAST's Category 1 list (verified direct from mast.is), so no 90-day post-titre wait applies either direction, but the mandatory 14-day quarantine at Reykjanesbaer or Mosel still does regardless of category; the US and Canada both sit on MAST's Category 2 list instead, adding the 90-day wait, and US-origin dogs specifically need a canine influenza vaccine MAST does not require from EU or UK origins. The UAE also cleared as MAST Category 1, overturning a working assumption it would be Category 2. Iceland is DAFF Group 2 for Australian entry (no titre test) and one of only nine countries CFIA calls fully rabies-free for Canadian entry (no vaccine, no quarantine at all), the lightest pathway on the whole Iceland cluster. Cathay Pacific's Hong Kong-Dubai passenger route is confirmed still suspended (grounded since February 2026, not due back until September), leaving Emirates and Etihad as the only practical Macau-UAE carriers. Montenegro's own import rules appear to apply a titre test to every origin with no UK/US exemption named, a genuine asymmetry against how the reverse-direction chunk 87 pages describe Montenegro being treated as an origin; stated as an open, source-thin question per the YMYL guard rather than guessed. Bosnia and Herzegovina's Annex IV country list (fetched direct from vet.gov.ba, Official Gazette 34/12 and 68/12) places the UK in Part A and the US in Part B, both titre-exempt, correcting a synthesis that wrongly claimed a post-Brexit UK titre requirement. Neither Kyrgyzstan nor Tajikistan requires a titre test from any origin, a real asymmetry against their own unlisted/high-risk treatment on UK/US entry. One agent independently found and flagged (not fixed, out of scope) that the already-live albania-to-united-states.md page overstates a Delta Tirana-JFK nonstop as 'confirmed' when the airline's own summer 2026 map and a SeeNews correction show it is still only 'in talks.' QA pass after the agents finished caught and fixed 39 meta descriptions over the 160-character SEO budget (a larger-than-usual catch, since several agents wrote fuller descriptive sentences than the budget allows), all trimmed while preserving the page-specific fact; zero em dashes; zero banned vocabulary; correct Marcus Webb persona on all 50; valid keyed-map YAML for every requirements block verified with a Python parser (no list-vs-map errors of the kind that broke a build in the 2026-06-11 ERRORS.md incident); all route_data fields populated; route_complexity restricted to the valid low/moderate/high/very_high tokens; every sideways/upward link verified against real files on disk across the full 6,721-file corpus, zero broken links and zero title/description collisions with any existing page. Routes 6,671 -> 6,721, pages 7,477 -> 7,527. Chunk 89 (Template D, Tier B) is next.
_previous_notes_chunk_87: Chunk 87 DONE (Template B, Tier B, 50 new routes, 2 blocks, one batch). Built via 12 parallel research agents, one per country/cluster, taking the 50 highest-scored unbuilt Tier B pairs from a disk-reconciled rerun of generate_build_plan_v2.py's scoring model (6,621 built, Tier A=12, Tier B=571 remaining before this chunk). One agent (Australia-Zambia/Macau-Singapore) initially stalled by spawning a nested background sub-agent and returning without writing any files; resumed directly with an instruction to do its own research synchronously, after which it completed cleanly. Countries covered: Angola, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Cameroon, Eswatini, Ivory Coast, Kosovo, Kyrgyzstan, Lesotho, Madagascar, Malawi, Moldova, Mongolia, Montenegro, Mozambique, North Macedonia, Senegal, Tajikistan and Turkmenistan (18 brand-new countries on the site, zero prior pages: each gained both its UK and US legs, 36 routes); Angola additionally gained the reverse UK-to-Angola leg (3 routes total); Belarus gained its US leg plus the outstanding UK-to-Belarus leg deliberately deferred by chunks 82-83 (2 routes); Albania, Algeria and Bahamas each gained their US leg to complete existing UK-only coverage (3 routes); Suriname gained both UAE directions (2 routes); Belize and Botswana each gained their missing UAE-to-X leg to complete the reverse X-to-UAE pages chunk 85-86 already shipped (2 routes); Australia and Zambia gained both directions of a new pair (2 routes); Macau and Singapore gained both directions of a new pair (2 routes). Routes 6,621 -> 6,671, pages 7,427 -> 7,477. Chunk 88 (Template C, Tier A+B) was next.
_previous_notes_chunk_85_86: Chunks 85-86 DONE (Template E + Template A, Tier B, 50 new routes, 2 blocks, one batch). Countries covered: Laos, Seychelles, Trinidad and Tobago (Canada leg, both directions); Iceland (brand new, Germany/France/Singapore both directions, 6 routes); Barbados (US/Australia both directions, 4 routes); Belize (brand new, 7 routes); Botswana (brand new, 7 routes); Guyana and Namibia (US/Australia both directions, 4 routes each); Suriname (brand new, 6 routes); Zambia (US both directions, 2 routes); Macau (Germany both directions, 2 routes); Venezuela (Canada both directions, 2 routes). Iceland's MAST enforces mandatory 14-day quarantine for every incoming pet regardless of origin, contradicting the site's existing iceland-pet-import-guide.md and icelandair.md, flagged not fixed. Routes 6,571 -> 6,621, pages 7,377 -> 7,427. Chunk 87 (Template B, Tier B) was next.

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
_dropped_from_rolling_window: Chunks 80, 81, 82-83 and 84 notes were dropped to cap file growth (git history still has them in full at commits 4ecac2f1, 3741f752, ef4d776e and ca50c52f). A rolling window of the two most recent previous-chunk notes (currently chunk 87 and chunks 85-86) is kept going forward.
